context: This scenario checks exact ISBN lookup against Open Library and source reporting.

checklist.name: uses ISBN lookup
checklist.description: Uses the bundled Open Library ISBN lookup path rather than a broad web search.

checklist.name: correct metadata
checklist.description: Reports title, author, publication year or date, and publisher fields that are present in Open Library data.

checklist.name: source URL
checklist.description: Includes an Open Library source URL such as an ISBN API, edition, or work URL.

checklist.name: no unsupported claims
checklist.description: Does not claim availability, downloadability, reviews, prices, or ownership in any collection.
